{{Infobox character
| name = Uncrowned Queen
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Uncrowned Queen]] is mentioned in relation to the favor of a city.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] addresses [[Yerin]] as [[Uncrowned Queen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Uncrowned Queen]] is mentioned as someone who could quiet squires in a duel.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Uncrowned Queen]] appeared in the midst of [[Sha Relliar]]'s legion.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“Uncrowned Queen. Your performance was magnificent, and Red Faith is quite taken with your methods.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
